title: Restaurants & Cafes
metaTitle: Billing & Recipe Inventory Software for Restaurants · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Free billing plus ingredient inventory, recipe costing and supplier purchase orders for restaurants and cafes. Control food cost, bill fast, keep clean books. Works worldwide.
keywords: restaurant software, cafe billing, recipe costing, food cost control, restaurant inventory, supplier purchase orders, restaurant erp
heroTitle: Bill fast, control food cost
heroSubtitle: Print receipts in seconds, track ingredients down to the gram, and know the true cost of every dish. Paper & Pen keeps the kitchen, the till and the books working together.

features.title: Quick receipts
features.desc: Take an order, apply tax and service, and print or share a receipt in seconds.

features.title: Recipe costing
features.desc: Define recipes from ingredients so you know the real cost of every dish.

features.title: Ingredient stock
features.desc: Track raw materials by unit, batch and expiry, with low-stock alerts.

features.title: Supplier orders
features.desc: Raise purchase orders to suppliers and update stock and cost on receipt.

features.title: Food cost percent
features.desc: Compare dish cost to menu price so your margins stay healthy.

features.title: Sales reports
features.desc: See top dishes, daily takings and trends across days and branches.

sections.title: Receipts that keep the line moving
sections.body: Lunch rush leaves no time for slow billing. Add items, apply VAT or service charge, take payment and hand over a clean receipt in seconds, then share it on WhatsApp if a guest asks. Every sale posts to your books automatically, so closing the day is a glance, not an evening of typing.
items: Add items and take payment fast
VAT and service charge handled for you

sections.title: Recipe costing that protects your margin
sections.body: A dish is only profitable if you know what it costs. Build recipes from ingredients, let Paper & Pen cost each plate from live purchase prices, and watch your food-cost percentage as supplier prices move. Track ingredients by batch and expiry, raise purchase orders, and keep waste in check. Built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR and 5% VAT, and ready for USD, EUR or any market.
items: Recipes costed from live ingredient prices
Batch and expiry tracking on raw materials
Purchase orders that update cost on receipt

faqs.q: Can I cost my menu from ingredient prices?
faqs.a: Yes. Define each dish as a recipe of ingredients and Paper & Pen calculates its cost from current purchase prices, so you can set menu prices that protect your margin.

faqs.q: Does it track ingredients and expiry?
faqs.a: Yes. Raw materials are tracked by unit of measure, batch and expiry date, with low-stock alerts so you reorder before you run dry.

faqs.q: Can I apply VAT and a service charge?
faqs.a: Yes. Apply 5% GCC VAT, a service charge or any tax rate, all calculated automatically on the bill.

faqs.q: Is billing free for a cafe?
faqs.a: Sales and Invoicing, including receipts, is free forever. Add Inventory and Manufacturing when you want ingredient tracking and recipe costing.

faqs.q: Can I manage more than one outlet?
faqs.a: Yes. Track sales and stock per branch and see live quantities and daily takings across all your outlets from one workspace.

ctaSub: Start free with receipts and billing, then add Inventory and recipe costing to take control of food cost.
